description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Sync ML models to Proxmox VM that triggers on push to tags model-deploy-net* and model-deploy-org*. Run a matrix job Sync ML models on ubuntu-latest for environments robotoff-ml-net and robotoff-ml-org, ensuring concurrency per environment and asset. For each environment, set common and specific variables, checkout the code, and use an SSH action to download ML models to a Proxmox VM.
